CREATE TABLE test_db.table1 (id UInt32, value String);
CREATE TABLE test_db.table2 (id UInt32, value String);
SELECT id, value FROM merge('test_db', 'table1|table2') AS merged_tables WHERE id > 1;
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM merge('test_db', 'table.*') AS merged_tables GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE test_db.temp_table AS SELECT id, value FROM merge('test_db', 'table.*');
SELECT t1.id, t2.value FROM merge('test_db', 'table1|table2') AS t1 JOIN merge('test_db', 'table2') AS t2 ON t1.id = t2.id;
CREATE TABLE test_db.another_table AS SELECT id, value FROM merge('test_db', 'table.*') WHERE value LIKE 't%';
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM merge('test_db', 'table.*') WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_db.table1) AND value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT * FROM merge('test_db', 'table.*') WHERE value IN (SELECT value FROM test_db.table1 WHERE value IS NOT NULL);
